TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tana == tana hya ga sramat ta ita tayal. meloh maku cikay niqun qu tana hiya. nnu'un abaw na tana hiya ga, mutu spgluw tmahuk sa ramat. qbuci nya hiya lga, grgran nha qurip. siki lnggan qu tana ga, baqun maniq. iyu' galan nha' iyu' qu tana hiya' ma. kinhulan s'utu biru‚Äã Ëæ≤Ê•≠Áü•Ë≠òÂÖ•Âè£Á∂≤
S.PHON: == tana == tana ƒßja …£a s~…ïramat ta ita tajal. meloƒß maku ¶~ ®ikaj niqun qu tana ƒßija. nnu îun aŒ≤aw na tana ƒßija …£a, mutu s~…ïp…£luw tmaƒßuk s~…ïa ramat. qŒ≤u ¶~ ®i nja ƒßija l…£a, …£r…£ran nƒßa qurip. s~…ïiki l≈ã…£an qu tana …£a, Œ≤aqun maniq. iju î …£alan nƒßa î iju î qu tana ƒßija î ma. kinƒßulan s~…ï îutu Œ≤iru* *******
